steps.description: Press the F1 key to open the command palette in Visual Studio Code, within the "Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit" context.

Type the command text 'microsoft 365 Agents:publish' into the command palette search field in the Visual Studio Code interface, specifically in the context of using the "Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit."
Press the "Enter" key to confirm the selected command, "Microsoft 365 Agents: Publish" in the command palette of Visual Studio Code.
